title: Banneton Bread Proofing Basket 11-Piece Set – Includes 9-Inch Round Basket, Bread Lame, Blades, Scrapers, Cotton Cover, Silicone Brush, and More – Sourdough Baking Kit
features: Complete Bread-Making Mastery: Elevate your baking game with a 13-piece set that includes everything you need to craft artisanal bread like a pro. From proofing baskets to essential tools, embrace the joy of baking with ease.

Premium Rattan Quality: Our banneton bread proofing baskets are handcrafted from grade-A Indonesian rattan, renowned for its smooth, non-stick, and eco-friendly properties. Experience exceptional bread texture and taste.
Multi-Purpose Bread Mastery: Shape, mold, and proof your dough effortlessly with 2 round baskets. Craft unique bread shapes while creating a delectable crispy crust after baking.

Easy Cleaning & Eco-Friendly: Enjoy hassle-free cleaning as excess flour shakes off effortlessly. Our eco-friendly, heavy-duty materials ensure long-lasting use and an eco-conscious baking experience.

Sourdough Starter Kit Gift: Not just a practical toolset, it's a perfect gift for seasoned bakers or those beginning their sourdough journey. Thoughtfully packaged in a beautiful design, it's a delightful gift for any occasion.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Liner, Stackable, Sturdy, Washable, maintain the shape, absorb excess moisture, create a beautiful pattern
specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x 9 inch Round Proofing Baskets with 1 x Cotton Liner, 1 x Metal Scraper and 1 x Plastic Scraper, 1 x Scoring Lame with 4 x Blades, 1x Silicone Basting Brush
